korean.politics: 트럼프 행정부가 이란 핵 협상에서 명확한 돌파구를 찾지 못하는 가운데, 이란이 87일간 지속된 인터넷 차단을 부분적으로 해제하기 시작했다는 보도가 나왔다. 중국 선저우-23 유인 우주선이 주취안 우주기지에서 발사됐다.
korean.economy: 삼성전자 노조 투표율이 3일차에 82.86%를 넘어서며 가결 분위기가 굳어졌다. 잠정합의안의 핵심인 평균 6.2% 임금 인상과 DS 반도체 부문 특별 성과급이 찬성 기류를 이끌고 있다.
korean.society: 하지 성지순례 기간 전 세계 150만 명 이상의 무슬림이 사우디아라비아 메카에 집결했다. 이란-미국 휴전 협상을 배경으로 중동 지역의 긴장이 지속되는 가운데 이뤄진 순례다.
korean.international: 러시아의 강력한 극초음속 탄도미사일 '오레슈니크' 공격으로 최소 2명이 숨지고 77명이 부상했다. 탈레반의 아동 결혼 허용 법률에 대한 국제사회의 비판이 고조됐다. 이란이 FIFA 월드컵 훈련 기지를 미국에서 멕시코로 변경했다.
korean.tech: 중국이 선저우-23 유인 우주선을 발사하며 우주 굴기를 이어갔다. AI 반도체 공급 안정화 전망 속에 글로벌 기술주가 강세를 유지했다.

english.politics: The Trump administration remained unable to reach a clear breakthrough in nuclear negotiations with Iran, while reports emerged that Iran had begun partially restoring internet access after an 87-day blackout. China launched the Shenzhou-23 crewed mission from the Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center.
english.economy: Samsung Electronics union vote turnout surpassed 82.86% on the third day of balloting, effectively sealing the likely passage of the tentative wage deal. The agreement's core terms — a 6.2% average pay raise and a special performance bonus for the DS semiconductor division — were driving the strong vote in favor.
english.society: More than 1.5 million Muslim pilgrims gathered in Mecca, Saudi Arabia for the annual Hajj pilgrimage, taking place against the backdrop of a tenuous Iran-U.S. ceasefire and ongoing regional tensions. International condemnation of the Taliban's new child marriage provisions continued to mount.
english.international: A Russian Oreshnik hypersonic ballistic missile strike killed at least two people and wounded 77 others. The missile, capable of carrying a nuclear warhead, was deployed amid ongoing fighting. International pressure over Afghanistan's Taliban-issued child marriage law also intensified. Iran relocated its FIFA World Cup training base from the U.S. to Mexico citing security concerns.
english.tech: China's Shenzhou-23 crewed spaceship launched successfully from Jiuquan, marking a fresh step in Beijing's expanding space program. Global technology stocks remained firm as concerns over AI chip supply disruptions from Samsung continued to ease.

vocabulary.example: The Trump administration remained unable to reach a clear breakthrough in nuclear negotiations with Iran.
Iran had begun partially restoring internet access after an 87-day blackout.
Samsung Electronics union vote turnout surpassed 82% on the third day of balloting.
The Oreshnik hypersonic missile, capable of carrying a nuclear warhead, was deployed amid ongoing fighting.
Pilgrims gathered for Hajj against the backdrop of a tenuous Iran-U.S. ceasefire.
Iran relocated its FIFA World Cup training base from the U.S. to Mexico citing security concerns.

sentences.sentence: Samsung Electronics union vote turnout surpassed 82.86% on the third day of balloting, effectively sealing the likely passage of the tentative wage deal.
sentences.point: 'effectively sealing ~'은 '사실상 ~을 확정 짓는'이라는 뜻의 분사 구조. 'surpass + 숫자'는 '~ 를 넘어서다'는 금융·통계 기사의 핵심 표현.
sentences.similar: Voter turnout exceeded 70% on the second day of the referendum, effectively sealing the outcome in favor of the reform.

sentences.sentence: More than 1.5 million Muslim pilgrims gathered in Mecca, Saudi Arabia for the annual Hajj pilgrimage, taking place against the backdrop of a tenuous Iran-U.S. ceasefire.
sentences.structure: [주어] + [동사] + in + [장소] + for + [명사], + [분사구] + against the backdrop of + [명사구]
sentences.point: 'against the backdrop of + 명사'는 '~을 배경으로'라는 고급 기자 표현. 사건의 배경 상황을 우아하게 추가하는 방법.
sentences.similar: The summit opened in Geneva, taking place against the backdrop of rising tensions between the two nuclear powers.

sentences.sentence: The Trump administration remained unable to reach a clear breakthrough in nuclear negotiations with Iran, while reports emerged that Iran had begun partially restoring internet access after an 87-day blackout.
sentences.point: 'remain + 형용사'는 '~한 상태를 유지하다'는 뜻. 'while + 절'은 대조 상황을 이어주는 접속사.
sentences.similar: The government remained unable to control inflation while reports emerged that consumers were cutting back on spending.

expressions.usage: 어떤 사건이 특정 상황이나 분위기 속에서 벌어질 때 배경을 설명하는 격식 표현
expressions.example: The peace talks resumed against the backdrop of renewed missile launches from the north.

expressions.usage: 공식 결과 발표 전에 결과가 거의 확정된 상황을 표현할 때 사용
expressions.example: The candidate's commanding lead in early results effectively sealed her victory.

expressions.usage: 압박·비판·우려 등이 점점 커질 때 사용. pressure/concern/criticism이 주어로 자주 옴
expressions.example: International pressure on the Taliban over the child marriage law continued to mount.

challenge.korean: 150만 명 이상의 무슬림 순례자들이 이란-미국 휴전이라는 불안한 배경 속에서 하지 성지순례를 위해 메카에 모였다.
challenge.answer: More than 1.5 million Muslim pilgrims gathered in Mecca for the annual Hajj pilgrimage, against the backdrop of a tenuous Iran-U.S. ceasefire.
challenge.explanation: 'against the backdrop of + 명사'는 배경 상황을 우아하게 추가하는 고급 표현. 'tenuous(미약한, 불안정한)'는 정치·외교 기사에서 휴전·합의가 깨지기 쉬운 상황을 묘사할 때 유용.

sources.title: Seoul Economic Daily - Samsung Union Vote 82%
